_comment: Mapping layer between abstract billable components and concrete meters. azure_groups become one Retail Prices API request each (region/currency appended at fetch time); azure_rate_keys match meters within a group by regex at parse time, so meter renames rot visibly (pricing-coverage findings), never silently. kind drives unit normalization: token prices are stored per 1M text units, hour/unit_hour per hour, gb_month per GB-month. Databricks $/DBU comes from system.billing.list_prices; per-1M-token DBU draws for pay-per-token endpoints are git-versioned constants with provenance because list_prices prices DBUs, not tokens.

azure_groups.aoai: serviceName eq 'Cognitive Services' and priceType eq 'Consumption'
azure_groups.foundry: serviceName eq 'Azure AI Foundry' and priceType eq 'Consumption'
azure_groups.search: serviceName eq 'Azure Cognitive Search' and priceType eq 'Consumption'
azure_groups.aks: serviceName eq 'Azure Kubernetes Service' and priceType eq 'Consumption'
azure_groups.storage: serviceName eq 'Storage' and skuName eq 'Hot LRS' and priceType eq 'Consumption'
azure_groups.postgres: serviceName eq 'Azure Database for PostgreSQL' and priceType eq 'Consumption'

azure_rate_keys.description: Open-weight AI model - reading (informational; not used by default model classes)
Open-weight AI model - writing (informational; not used by default model classes)
Managed document search - basic capacity unit
Managed document search - standard capacity unit
Cloud file storage, per GB per month
Small managed database for per-user working state
Standard managed database for per-user working state

databricks_rate_keys.description: Databricks pay-per-token AI models, $ per DBU
Databricks document search index, $ per DBU
Databricks serverless jobs (quality-check suites), $ per DBU
Databricks operational database for per-user working state, $ per DBU

databricks.provenance: Databricks Foundation Model API pay-per-token rate card, efficient model class (claude-haiku family), captured 2026-06. Multiplied by the live $/DBU list price from system.billing.list_prices.
Databricks Foundation Model API pay-per-token rate card, standard model class (claude-sonnet family), captured 2026-06. Multiplied by the live $/DBU list price from system.billing.list_prices.
Databricks Foundation Model API pay-per-token rate card, efficient model class used for AI-graded reviews, captured 2026-06. Multiplied by the live $/DBU list price.
Databricks Foundation Model API pay-per-token rate card, embedding model class (gte-large family), captured 2026-06. Multiplied by the live $/DBU list price.
